auth.note: Session cookie must be present and valid. Caller must be the account owner or an authorized system caller (e.g., Stripe webhook handler). PATCH is system-initiated for billing cycle grants and tool-use decrements.

contract.title: Update Account Entitlements
contract.governs: Mutation of a taxpayer account's entitlements record. Updates token balances (decrement on tool use, grant on billing cycle renewal). Follows write pipeline: receipt R2 → canonical R2 (tmp_entitlements/{account_id}.json) → D1 projection (tmp_entitlements table).

taxToolTokens.description: New tax tool token balance (replaces existing balance)

transcriptTokens.description: New transcript token balance (replaces existing balance)

shape.taxToolTokens: integer — updated tax tool token balance
shape.tokensGrantedAt: string | null — ISO timestamp of last token grant
shape.billingPeriodEnd: string | null — ISO timestamp of billing period end
shape.updatedAt: string — ISO timestamp of this update

error.400: Bad request — invalid payload or plan value
error.403: Forbidden — caller not authorized to update this account's entitlements
